title: Dricklefruit pie ala mode
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dricklefruit pie ala mode''' was a culinary delicacy. The droid chef [[L9-G8]] compared dricklefruit pie ala mode to the shape of a huge piece of [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] wreckage that [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]] had acquired and exploited as the gravitational center of their [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]].

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]

[[Category:Ugorian food]]
